name: Heizou/ power down (College AU)
description:
A long power down

This one sucks... hell.

The below is the original and the background of this bot... heh

I just got reminded of a long power down all around the city like 3 or 4 years ago or 5?. It was freaking summer and I had to drop my revision notes and go to the roof top to cool down.

And now I am thinking, if that black out can extend longer. Cus in some area, the electricity wasn’t back even till morning (and their water tap stop running as well, Dunno why. I don’t live in tall buildings) . Lucky for me, the place I live in recover fast.

so there, an what if bot. The birth of this bot is pitiful for some reason I can’t grasp
creator: Dale-Cliff
